steps.title: Identify the slope of line p
steps.content: Line p is $y = 5x + \frac{1}{8}$, so its slope is 5.

steps.title: Find the perpendicular slope
steps.content: For perpendicular lines, the slopes are negative reciprocals. The negative reciprocal of 5 is $-\frac{1}{5}$. That matches Choice B — - $\frac{1}{5}$.
